index.description: Name of the index to retrieve documents from when `ids` are specified, or when a document in the `docs` array does not specify an index.

preference.description: Specifies the node or shard the operation should be performed on. Random by default.

realtime.description: If `true`, the request is real-time as opposed to near-real-time.

refresh.description: If `true`, the request refreshes relevant shards before retrieving documents.

routing.description: Custom value used to route operations to a specific shard.

_source.description: True or false to return the `_source` field or not, or a list of fields to return.

_source_excludes.description: A comma-separated list of source fields to exclude from the response. You can also use this parameter to exclude fields from the subset specified in `_source_includes` query parameter.

_source_includes.description: A comma-separated list of source fields to include in the response. If this parameter is specified, only these source fields are returned. You can exclude fields from this subset using the `_source_excludes` query parameter. If the `_source` parameter is `false`, this parameter is ignored.

stored_fields.description: If `true`, retrieves the document fields stored in the index rather than the document `_source`.

docs.description: The documents you want to retrieve. Required if no index is specified in the request URI.

ids.description: The IDs of the documents you want to retrieve. Allowed when the index is specified in the request URI.

_index.description: The index that contains the document.

routing.description: The key for the primary shard the document resides on. Required if routing is used during indexing.

stored_fields.description: The stored fields you want to retrieve.

exclude_vectors.description: If `true`, vector fields are excluded from the returned source. This option takes precedence over `includes`: any vector field will remain excluded even if it matches an `includes` rule.

excludes.description: A list of fields to exclude from the returned source.

exclude.description: A list of fields to exclude from the returned source.

includes.description: A list of fields to include in the returned source.

include.description: A list of fields to include in the returned source.
